title: Google brings a Gemini-powered agent into Ad Manager
friendlyTitle: Google adds an AI helper for ad managers
summary: Google is rolling out Ask Ad Manager, a Gemini-powered assistant for publishers using Google Ad Manager. The beta lets users ask natural-language questions about performance, troubleshoot delivery problems, generate reports, and navigate the platform.
friendlySummary: Google is adding an AI assistant to Ad Manager. Publishers can ask it questions, find problems, and create reports in plain language.
whyItMatters: Ad operations are a useful test case for enterprise agents because the work is data-heavy, repetitive, and high-stakes. If tools like this work well, more business software will shift from menus and dashboards toward conversational diagnosis and action.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make complex business software easier to use. Instead of clicking through many menus, people may just ask for what they need.
